title: Denseplast
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Denseplast''' was a dense, weighty material that was used in the manufacture of workout balls, a type of exercise device.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]

===Non-canon appearances===
*<!-- 2013-10-11 -->''[[Star Wars: Tiny Death Star]]''
